EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITopologyGraph

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control the topology graph.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("4ADC1017-3C78-434B-A32C-1817A42EB857")]
public interface ITopologyGraph

Properties

BuildExtent

The extent used to build the graph.

IEnvelope BuildExtent { get; }

Property Value

IEnvelope

Examples

Sample Snippet

BuildPolygonExtent

The polygon used to determine the contents of the topology graph. The topology graph maintains ownership of this reference.

IPolygon BuildPolygonExtent { get; }

Property Value

IPolygon

Examples

Sample Snippet

EdgeSelection

The enumerator for the selected edges of the topology.

IEnumTopologyEdge EdgeSelection { get; }

Property Value

IEnumTopologyEdge

Examples

Sample Snippet

Edges

The enumerator that provides access to all the edges.

IEnumTopologyEdge Edges { get; }

Property Value

IEnumTopologyEdge

Examples

Sample Snippet

Extent

The current extent of all topological elements in the graph. This may be different than the extent used to build the graph.

IEnvelope Extent { get; }

Property Value

IEnvelope

Examples

Sample Snippet

HasElement[ITopologyElement]

Indicates if the topology graph contains the specified element.

bool HasElement[ITopologyElement Element] { get; }

Parameters

Element ITopologyElement

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

HasPseudoNodes

Indicates if the topology graph contains pseudo nodes.

bool HasPseudoNodes { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsPosting

Indicates if the topology graph is posting.

bool IsPosting { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

NodeSelection

The enumerator for the selected nodes of the topology.

IEnumTopologyNode NodeSelection { get; }

Property Value

IEnumTopologyNode

Examples

Sample Snippet

Nodes

The enumerator that provides access to all the nodes.

IEnumTopologyNode Nodes { get; }

Property Value

IEnumTopologyNode

Examples

Sample Snippet

SelectionCount[int]

The count of selected elements of the specified types; whichElements is a bitwise combination of esriTopologyElement values.

int SelectionCount[int whichElements] { get; }

Parameters

whichElements int

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

SelectionExtent[int, bool]

The extent of the selected subset of the graph, optionally includes extent of all edges incident on selected nodes (or on nodes incident on selected edges); whichElements is a bitwise combination of esriTopologyElement values.

IEnvelope SelectionExtent[int whichElements, bool includeAdjacent] { get; }

Parameters

whichElements int
includeAdjacent bool

Property Value

IEnvelope

Examples

Sample Snippet

SelectionParents

The feature class and oid of each parent of the selected set of elements.

IEnumTopologyParent SelectionParents { get; }

Property Value

IEnumTopologyParent

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

Build(IEnvelope, bool) 

void Build(IEnvelope Extent, bool preserveSelection)

Parameters

Extent IEnvelope
preserveSelection bool

BuildFromPolygon(IPolygon, bool) 

void BuildFromPolygon(IPolygon Extent, bool preserveSelection)

Parameters

Extent IPolygon
preserveSelection bool

DeleteEdge(ITopologyEdge) 

void DeleteEdge(ITopologyEdge Edge)

Parameters

Edge ITopologyEdge

DeletePseudoNodesFromSelection()

Removes pseudo-nodes by combining edges incident on such nodes. Edges and nodes in the current selection are considered.

void DeletePseudoNodesFromSelection()

Examples

Sample Snippet

DetermineNodeDegree()

Nodes located outside a polygonal build extent do not have a known degree (valence). Apply this method before using the Degree or IsDegreeKnown properties of a topology node from this graph.

void DetermineNodeDegree()

Examples

Merge a connected sequence of selected edges that has the same feature parent set.

SetEmpty()

Removes all topological elements from the graph. Any client-side references to topo elements that came from this graph should be released.

void SetEmpty()

SetSelectionEmpty(int)

Clears the specified selection set: whichType is a bitwise combination of esriTopologyNode, esriTopologyEdge.

void SetSelectionEmpty(int whichType)

whichType int
